case_title: ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC VS CLAY'S BBQ, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $489.92 FILED BY ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC AS TO DEFENDANT CLAY'S BBQ, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CLAY'S BBQ, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLAY'S BBQ, INC. $489.92 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $559.92 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SOLANO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CLAY'S BBQ, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CLAY'S BBQ, INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SOLANO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $719.22 AS TO DEFENDANT CLAY'S BBQ, INC.
